name: Ham and Corn Chowder
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a large pot over medium heat.
2. Add onion and sauté until tender.
3. Stir in cream style corn, salt, ham, and pepper.
4. Gradually add melted butter and Half & half to the mixture.
5. Simmer on low heat for 10-15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
6. Garnish with croutons or crackers before serving.
7. Makes 6-8 servings.
